steps.text: Bakers make bread and cakes for everyone. They start work very, very early — before the sun even comes up!
Four o'clock in the morning! It is still dark. The baker is already hard at work while everyone else is asleep. Press Start baking.
After a few hours, the bread is ready. Then the shop opens so people can buy it.
Seven o'clock — the sun is up and the shop is open. Fresh bread, ready to go! Press Shop opens!
Next comes the busy morning — lots of customers!
Ten o'clock — the shop is full! Everyone wants bread for lunch. Press Busy morning.
Last of all, the baker closes the shop and goes home to rest.

steps.feedback: Two o'clock and the baker is done! Start baking, open the shop, busy morning, then home. That is the baker's whole day.
